event: Landscape with Dancing Satyrs and Nymphs
symbols: dancing figures — the uninhibited celebration of the pagan world, revelry outside the covenant
vast landscape — the grandeur and indifference of nature as an autonomous domain apart from divine revelation
golden afternoon light — the fleeting beauty of the natural order
reclining satyr in foreground — sensuality and bodily abandon
distant mountains and river — the classical Arcadian ideal of a world before the Fall, or outside it entirely
towering trees — the ancient sacred groves of pagan worship
description: A sweeping pastoral landscape under a dramatic sky of blue and white clouds, with distant blue-grey mountains and a river winding through a broad valley. In the middle ground, a group of nude and semi-nude figures — men, women, and children — dance in a circle on a grassy clearing. To the right, beneath large dark trees, additional figures sit or recline together. In the left foreground, a nude male figure lies on the ground near the riverbank.

_meta.title: Landscape With Dancing Satyrs and Nymphs
